titleStmt.title: SII 18.169: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 169. (B.K. No. 31 of 1933-34.) KĀGINELLI, HIREKERUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Hero-stone in the bund of the tank called Kāginellikere.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year [6]0, Rākshasa, Chaitra śu. 2, Monday. The details correspond regularly to A.D. 1135, March 18, Monday.

It records the death of Rājaṇa, the younger brother of Malleya-Nāyaka of Jiḍugūr. The hero died in a fight with Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Biṭṭiyarasa who attacked the fort of Hāhanūr (modern Hāvanūr). It is stated that the deceased had been asked to guard the agrahāra Hāhanūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallikārjjunadēvara Agrahāra
hāhanūra kāpige pēḷdalli cāḷukyavikramakālada 60 neya rākṣasa saṁvatsa
rada caitra śuddha 2 sōmavāradaṁdu mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ biṭṭiyarasaṁ hāhanūra

suttikoṁḍakōṭe hōgi peṁḍiruḍeyurccuvalli heṟage haḷivara gaṁḍaṁ baṁṭara bāvaṁ
ratottu jeḍugūra malleyanāyakana tammanekkaṭiga rājaṇaṁ kaṇḍu bappa
kudureyaṁ karadu mūdalisi paridu tāgiyarmmidaraṁ koṁdu Aṁjidaraṁ kāydu
kaḷipi pageya bīḍu saṁgaḍamuṁ pogaḷe tammaṇṇana pesarumaṁ tanna gaṁḍuma ni
lisi muṁdaṇaḍiyaṁ peṟagiḍade suralōkaprāptanāda ©
Digital edition of SII 18.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
